screenshots.baseline: Kimi homepage loads directly into chat interface. Left sidebar: Kimi logo, New Chat (Ctrl+K), Websites, Docs, Slides, Sheets, Deep Research, Kimi Code, Kimi Claw (Beta), Chat History, Mobile App, user profile (최장희), Upgrade button. Center: empty chat area with input box.
screenshots.response: User message displayed as green bubble top-right: 'Hello, how are you today?'. Kimi response below with blue circle avatar: 'Hello! I'm doing well, thank you for asking. 😊 It's a beautiful Monday morning, and I'm ready to help you with whatever you need today. How can I assist you?' Action buttons below response: copy, regenerate, share, thumbs up, thumbs down.

frontend_structure.layout: Left sidebar (220px) + Center chat area + Bottom input

chat_area.ai_response: Left-aligned with blue circle avatar, white background, action buttons below (copy, regenerate, share, thumbs up/down)
chat_area.title_bar: Chat title at top center with dropdown arrow

frontend_structure.model_info: K2.5 Instant (default model shown in dropdown)

api_info.response_format: Streaming Connect RPC JSON (newline-delimited JSON objects with op/mask/eventOffset/message)
api_info.note: Full API details in #385 HAR capture result

warning_design_notes.response_injection_point: AI response area is left-aligned div below user message bubble. Responses stream in via Connect RPC protocol. Warning could be injected as a replacement response bubble or alert overlay.
warning_design_notes.dom_structure_hint: Chat messages appear in a scrollable container. Each message has role (user/assistant) and blocks with text content.
warning_design_notes.input_area_hint: Input area is a contenteditable div with placeholder text. Model selector dropdown is adjacent.

notes: Kimi Frontend Inspect completed. kimi.moonshot.cn redirects to www.kimi.com. Chat interface is a modern SPA with sidebar navigation. No login required for basic chat. Chat API uses Connect RPC protocol (application/connect+json) - NOT SSE, NOT WebSocket. User message is clearly in POST body JSON. Combined with #385 HAR capture, Kimi API structure is fully documented for APF implementation.
